description: Case style: Stainless steel square shaped dial, grey upperDial style: Textured black dial, steel colour, grey and red colour markings, black hands with grey accents, branding near the 12 hour mark, date display near the 3 hour mark Strap style: grey strap with a shiny texture, has a tang closure, adjustable for a snug fit Features: Analog watch, screw to reset time and date Water resistance: Up to 50 m Warranty: 2 years international warranty
